zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Lennox於1378年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲時，她的父親Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox33歲，母親Helen Campbell22歲。她於大約1390年與Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年5月18日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Lennox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from the districtnear Dumbarton, recorded in 1174 in the form Leuenaichs and inthe following year as Levenax. Apparently it is named fromGaelic leamhan ‘elm’ + the locative suffix -ach +English -s.

variants.name: Lenox
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lennox  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Lennox was born in 1378, in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, was 33 and her mother, Helen Campbell, was 22. She married Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch about 1390, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 18 May 1451, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Lennox est née en 1378, à The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Helen Campbell, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch environ 1390, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mai 1451, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Lennox 1378 in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox 33 und ihre Mutter Helen Campbell 22. Sie hat um 1390 in Scotland Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Mai 1451 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch circa 1390, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 maggio 1451, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Lennoxが1378年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアス レノックスで生まれた時，父Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennoxは33歳，母Helen Campbellは22歳であった。約1390年にスコットランドでAlexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年5月18日にスコットランドアルグイルで73歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Lennox(이)가 1378년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 테 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen Campbell(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1390년 스컷랜드에서 Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 5월 18일 스컷랜드 아그이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Lennox nasceu em 1378, em The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Helen Campbell, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch aproximadamente 1390, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de maio de 1451, em Argyll, Scotland, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Lennox родилась в 1378 г. в местности т леннокс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Helen Campbell, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch около 1390 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 мая 1451 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
